item.title: A peek into BERT
item.description: Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers abbreviated from BERT was one of the first major breakthroughs in the field of Large Language Models as we know them now. This represents a shift in how machines understand human language, enabling them to understand the intricate nuances and contextual dependencies that make human communication rich and meaningful. Key Concepts BERT is powered by a powerful neural network architecture known as Transformers. This architecture incorporates a mechanism called self-attention, allowing BERT to weigh the significance of each word based on its context, both preceding and succeeding.
